title: GATE Memory Quality Decision Event (C18)
description: Emitted by the C18 Data Quality Gate (Memory Gateway) for every retrieval. Captures the per-item decision against the signed quality bundle: freshness, confidence, and provenance gates.

request_hash.description: Hash of the originating MemoryRequest. Correlates the quality decision to the retrieval.

item_id.description: Stored item identifier (vector store ID, document ID, or equivalent).

content_class.description: Content class taxonomy key. Drives the per-class TTL, minimum confidence, and provenance-required configuration in the quality bundle.

freshness_age_seconds.description: Item age in seconds at retrieval time.

confidence_score.description: Confidence score recorded at write time. Semantics defined by the upstream pipeline. C18 enforces the per-class threshold; it does not compute the score.

provenance_uri.description: Resolvable external reference to the item's source. Self-referential URIs are not accepted.

provenance_hash_verified.description: True when the stored provenance_hash matches the hash of the source descriptor resolved from provenance_uri.

quality_bundle_hash.description: Hash of the signed quality bundle in force when this decision was made. Recorded so the decision is replayable.

outcome.description: Resolved quality-gate outcome. Severity order: deny > downgrade > flag > pass.

flags_set.description: Quality flags returned alongside the item. Downstream consumers (agent runtime, prompt template, C13 trace) MUST honour these.

quality_override.description: Present only when a break-glass override admitted an otherwise-denied retrieval. See memory_request.quality_override.
